name: zendesk
description: Operation ledger and typed read surface for the official Zendesk Support API; stream-backed reads and bounded direct reads are enabled while binary and write lanes remain gated.

risk.read: bounded ETL streams are enabled for 70 top-level collection reads and bounded direct-read JSON commands remain enabled for typed GET operations; binary downloads are still gated by later Zendesk lanes
risk.write: operation-ledger bundle in issue #160; Zendesk mutations remain blocked until typed reverse-ETL schemas, approval text, redaction, and destructive confirmation are added
risk.approval: all external writes remain plan → preview → approval → execute and blocked in this slice
